title: ERD Link Bundling — Simplify Multiple Connections Between Objects
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing the ERD, I want to toggle a 'Simplify' mode that consolidates multiple relationship lines between two objects into a single inbound and single outbound line, so that the diagram is easier to read without losing the underlying relationship data.
description:
When two objects have multiple field relationships (inbound or outbound), the ERD draws one colored line per relationship, which becomes visually overwhelming. This feature adds a "Simplify" toggle that uses GoJS Link Bundles to consolidate multiple connections between any two objects into at most one inbound and one outbound line.

The simplification is purely visual — the underlying data model retains all individual relationships (important for future API exposure). The toggle is implemented as an icon button using Bootstrap Icons:
- `bi bi-arrows-collapse-vertical` when simplify is on
- `bi bi-arrows-expand-vertical` when simplify is off

The toggle defaults to off (all lines shown). GoJS support provided a Link Bundles example that was adapted for this implementation.
acceptance_criteria: A 'Simplify' toggle icon appears in the ERD toolbar
When toggled on, multiple connections between two objects consolidate into at most one inbound and one outbound line
When toggled off, all individual relationship lines are shown
The toggle defaults to off on page load
The underlying relationship data is not modified — only the visual rendering changes
The toggle icon uses bi bi-arrows-collapse-vertical (on) and bi bi-arrows-expand-vertical (off)
The icon fits on a single line without wrapping in the toolbar container
ux_changes: New 'Simplify' toggle icon in the ERD toolbar that consolidates multiple relationship lines between objects into bundled connections using GoJS Link Bundles. Icons swap between collapse/expand vertical arrows to indicate state.
implementation_notes: Implemented using GoJS Link Bundles feature. A support ticket was opened with the GoJS team to confirm the approach. The provided example HTML was adapted to work with the existing ERD diagram. Bootstrap Icons bi-arrows-collapse-vertical and bi-arrows-expand-vertical were specified but didn't render correctly, so inline SVGs were used as fallback. Container width was adjusted to prevent icon wrapping.
comment_summary: GoJS support was consulted and provided a Link Bundles example. The toggle was initially labeled 'Toggle' but renamed to 'Simplify'. Bootstrap Icons didn't render correctly for the specified classes, so inline SVGs were used. Container sizing was adjusted after the icon wrapped to a new line.
